text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, November 21. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Sleep quality is so important. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
